title: Kaikei v1 envelope
description: Top-level envelope for every kaikei webhook delivery. The producing client identity is NOT carried here -- the receiver derives it from the per-client signing secret.

event_id.description: ULID (Crockford Base32, 26 chars). Deterministic per source event; the receiver dedups on this.

event_type.description: One of the five v1 event types.

schema_version.description: Pinned to the package MAJOR. v1.x.x -> 1.

data.description: Per-event-type payload. Validated against the matching payload schema selected by event_type.
